title: glechoma crinita
intro: Glechoma crinita, also known as Russian melittis or hairy honey plant, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Glechoma crinita is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant's medicinal properties also provide various health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial effects, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Glechoma crinita is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
